Check Description Category Site Value Source Value Difference Status
eia_price_match Gas price from whatchanged.us vs EIA API for the same area (BOSTON). Tolerance: ±$0.05/gal. gas 3.671 3.671 0.0 $/gal (tol: 0.05) PASS
aaa_cross_check Cross-check gas price against AAA state average (scraped via Playwright). Best-effort — layout changes may break extraction. gas 3.671 3.834 0.163 $/gal (tol: 0.15) WARN
grocery_index_match BLS CPI grocery index value from the site vs directly from the BLS API for the same series ID. cpi 318.252 318.252 0.0 index points (tol: 0.01) PASS
grocery_pct_change_internal Internal consistency: does the displayed grocery % change match (current - baseline) / baseline x 100? cpi 0.4 0.4 0.0 percentage points (tol: 0.1) PASS
shelter_data_present Confirms BLS shelter CPI series has data. The site shows shelter cost % change from this series. cpi — View source — PASS
shelter_change_reasonable Sanity check: shelter % change is between -20% and +50%. cpi 2.7 — — PASS
